name: implies_apply_closure_bridge
reason: implies_apply is external_body bridging p.implies(q).satisfied_by(ex) through TempPred::new closure wrapping and direct implication — silently resolves closure identity mismatch

name: entails_and_weakens_to_single
reason: and-ing an arbitrary spec2 still entails p from spec1 alone — the second conjunct is completely unconstrained, meaning spec1.and(anything) entails p, weakening the combined specification's discriminating power

name: entails_and_false_spec
reason: unsatisfiable specs vacuously entail any conjunction — entails_and_different_temp propagates this without checking satisfiability, potentially hiding specification errors

name: entails_and_self_redundant
reason: using spec.and(spec) — which should be equivalent to spec — requires the external_body axiom to resolve the and-closure's intensional gap, and the result hides that spec alone should suffice

name: valid_implies_entails_anything
reason: if valid(p) holds then spec.entails(p) for any spec — implies_apply resolves the closure bridge to make any valid property trivially entailed, collapsing the distinction between validity and entailment
